hero_description: An English learning system based on FSRS algorithm and personalized AI. Review at the right time, remember long-term - no need to study too much.
value_prop_subtitle: Combining cognitive science and AI technology for the best learning efficiency
fsrs_description: FSRS algorithm calculates optimal review timing, helping you remember without over-studying.
ml_description: AI learns from your behavior to adjust review schedules and difficulty suitable for each person.
listening_description: Dictation practice, reading comprehension - train practical skills daily.
writing_description: Write on topics, receive AI feedback on grammar, vocabulary, and expression.
how_it_works_subtitle: Just 4 simple steps to start your effective English learning journey
step1_description: Take a quick test so the system understands your level and learning goals.
step2_title: AI creates personal word set & schedule
step2_description: FSRS algorithm creates optimal review schedule suited to your memory capacity.
step3_title: Learn via flashcard, listening, reading, writing
step3_description: Diverse learning methods: flashcards, dictation, reading translation, AI-graded writing.
step4_description: Visual dashboard shows progress, AI suggests appropriate next steps.
science_title: FSRS - The smartest review algorithm today
spaced_repetition_description: is a review method based on the "forgetting curve" - you only review when about to forget, saving up to 90% of time.
fsrs_algo_description: is a next-generation algorithm, 1.5x more accurate than Anki in predicting when you're about to forget.
ml_algo_description: in our system learns from your behavior - response time, accuracy, study time - to adjust the algorithm specifically for you.
experience_subtitle: Not just vocabulary - simultaneously train Listening, Reading, Writing to master English
listening_tab_description: Listen to real audio and transcribe. The system automatically checks errors, helping you identify weaknesses in pronunciation and vocabulary.
reading_tab_description: Read articles and translate sentence by sentence. Deeply understand grammar, sentence structure, and word usage in real context.
writing_tab_description: Write on topics, receive AI feedback on grammar, vocabulary, structure, and writing style.
dashboard_subtitle: Smart dashboard helps you know exactly where you are and what to do next
testimonials_subtitle: Over 10,000 people have improved their English with our method
review1_content: I've tried many English learning apps but this is the only one that helps me actually remember vocabulary. After 3 months, my vocabulary doubled!
review2_content: The dictation feature helped me improve my listening significantly. Now I can listen to English podcasts without subtitles.
review3_content: I recommend this app to all my students. The FSRS algorithm is really effective, students progress noticeably faster.
faq_subtitle: Answers to common questions about our method and application
faq1_question: What is FSRS and how is it different from Anki?
faq1_answer: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) is a next-generation algorithm developed by the open-source community. Research shows FSRS is about 1.5x more accurate than Anki's SM-2 algorithm in predicting when you'll forget information.
faq2_question: How long do I need to study each day?
faq2_answer: Just 15-30 minutes per day is enough. The key is consistent daily practice, not cramming. The system will automatically adjust the workload to fit your available time.
faq3_question: Is the app suitable for beginners?
faq3_answer: Absolutely! The system will assess your level through an initial test and create a suitable learning path. Whether you're a beginner or advanced, AI will personalize content for you.
faq4_answer: Definitely! We use end-to-end encryption and don't share personal data with third parties. You have full control and can delete your data at any time.

cta_subtitle: Join over 10,000 users who have improved their English with our scientific method

dashboard_error_all: Unable to load FSRS dashboard data. Please try again later.
dashboard_error_partial: Some FSRS blocks failed to load, but partial data is still shown.
dashboard_daily_empty: No review data for this period yet.
dashboard_retrievability_info: This is the chance you remember the vocabulary right now. When you just finished learning, this rate is 100%. Over time, it will gradually decrease. For example: A 85% retrievability means if tested now, you have an 85% chance of answering correctly. When this rate drops low, the system will remind you to review!
dashboard_stability_info: This is a measure of how deeply the vocabulary has 'rooted' in your brain. This index is measured in days. For example: If a word has a Stability of 30 days, it means you can go for a full month and the recall probability only drops slightly to 90%. The higher the stability, the longer you remember and the less frequent you need to review!
dashboard_fsrs_summary_info: Retrievability (%) tells you when you're about to forget for scheduling reminders. Stability (Days) tells you the quality of your memory. Each time you review at the right time, Stability will jump, significantly extending the interval until the next lesson.
